meta.title: The Roster, Elevate Agency
meta.description: Meet the Elevate roster, a growing crew of Sunshine Coast selectors, DJs and live acts across house, techno, UKG and more. Tap any name for the full profile.
meta.ogDescription: The artists moving the coast. Meet the Elevate roster.

hero.lede: A growing crew of Sunshine Coast selectors, DJs and live acts, booked, backed and built up by Elevate. Tap any name for the full profile.

cta.heading: on the decks, or behind them?
cta.body: Whether you want to book one of these names or join the roster yourself, it starts with one message.
